assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with ForwardDefaultSelector using Selector.ForwardReferenceToken to forward reference tokens to introspection
Program.cs configures AddOAuth2Introspection with ClientId and ClientSecret for the API
assertions.rationale: AddOAuth2Introspection is configured with ClientId = 'catalog-api' and ClientSecret = 'api-secret'.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers two authentication scheme handlers (JWT Bearer and introspection)
assertions.rationale: Both AddJwtBearer('Bearer') and AddOAuth2Introspection('introspection') are registered.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
assertions.rationale: MapInboundClaims = false is set on the JWT Bearer handler.
